overview: DermaAI is an AI-powered skin disease detection assistant that helps users identify possible skin conditions through image capture and symptom analysis, then provides care recommendations and nearby dermatologist suggestions.
features: Internet Identity authentication with protected routes
Permission consent flow for camera, location, and data usage
Camera capture and image upload via platform extensions
Symptom input form with checkboxes, duration, and age group
AI skin disease prediction with confidence scores (Acne, Eczema, Psoriasis, Fungal, Allergy)
Treatment and care recommendations per predicted disease
Nearby dermatologist suggestions using browser geolocation
Personalized dashboard with last 20 analysis history
Medical-themed UI with white, light blue, soft green palette
